title: Ship Replacement Program (SRP)
intro: Replace hull names, percentages, and caps with your alliance policy. Edit fleet-tracker/data/srp_matrix.json or mount a file and set FLEET_TRACKER_SRP_MATRIX_PATH.

rows.notes: Meta hulls only if listed on doctrine page.
Requires doctrine ping or FC-listed hull.
Screenshot + zKill link within 24h of loss.
On fleet on time; comms in official fleet channel.
SRP cap applies to hull only unless FC authorizes implants.
